summary:
Apremilast is FDA-approved and clinically effective for treating oral ulcers, a primary manifestation of Behçet’s syndrome. Despite lacking efficacy for other symptoms like arthritis or skin involvement, its approved use and demonstrated success in addressing a core aspect of the disease support its recognition as an effective treatment option for Behçet’s syndrome.  

$\boxed{\text{A}}$
